title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: JEFFERSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 500 NE A Street Suite 102 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 475-4456 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-4456 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jefferson County Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JEFFERSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
